title: Show and persist the button click counter

requirements.text: Display the current button press count in the main UI so users can see how many times they have clicked the red button.
acceptanceCriteria: The UI shows a numeric click counter on the main screen while the button is visible (before the explosion).
The counter increments by 1 on each successful button click (and does not increment during the explosion state).
The explosion trigger at exactly 1000 clicks continues to work as before.

requirements.text: Persist the click counter in the browser so that refreshing the page does not reset progress toward 1000 clicks.
acceptanceCriteria: After a page refresh, the displayed click counter restores to the last saved value.
The persisted counter updates after each click (no more than one click behind).
If stored data is missing or invalid, the counter safely falls back to 0 without breaking the UI.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or any paths listed in frontend.immutablePaths (compose existing components instead).
Keep existing explosion sequence behavior (trigger at 1000 clicks, animation, then redirect) intact aside from ensuring the counter display/persistence does not interfere.
nonGoals: Do not add backend persistence or leaderboards for click counts.
Do not change Internet Identity authentication behavior.
